_comment: Curated license-plate models. download_url values are taken directly from the open-image-models package source (hub.py) and existence-verified. sha256 empty = trust-on-first-use: the first download computes the hash and PINS it here; later downloads must match it.

models.label: Open Image Models - YOLOv9-T 640 (balanced)
models.attribution: Model: ankandrew/open-image-models (MIT). Training data derived from a Roboflow license-plate dataset (CC BY 4.0).
models.notes: mAP50 0.958. Good default: strong accuracy, 640px input matches OpenScrub's face-detection size.

models.label: Open Image Models - YOLOv9-S 608 (most accurate)
models.attribution: Model: ankandrew/open-image-models (MIT). Training data derived from a Roboflow license-plate dataset (CC BY 4.0).
models.notes: mAP50 0.966 (highest). Slightly slower; best for stills or when accuracy matters most.

models.label: Open Image Models - YOLOv9-T 256 (fastest)
models.attribution: Model: ankandrew/open-image-models (MIT). Training data derived from a Roboflow license-plate dataset (CC BY 4.0).
models.notes: mAP50 0.858. Fastest; use for real-time-ish passes or lower-power machines. Lower recall on small/distant plates.
